title: Iceberg Logical error: 'ChunkInfoRowNumbers does not exist'
description:
### Describe the bug
Easy to reproduce.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 Int) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/');
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1)
ALTER TABLE t0 DELETE WHERE c0 == 1;
INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION icebergLocal(s3, structure = 'c0 Int', format = 'ORC', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t0/') (c0) VALUES (2);
OPTIMIZE TABLE t0; --Logical error
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace

INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES (1)

key_bug_features: OPTIMIZE TABLE after deleting rows in IcebergLocal
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 Int, c1 String, c2 Nullable(Float64)) ENGINE = IcebergLocal(local, path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t1/');
INSERT INTO t1 (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
ALTER TABLE t1 DELETE WHERE c0 = 1;

INSERT INTO TABLE FUNCTION icebergLocal(s3, structure = 'c0 Int, c1 String, c2 Nullable(Float64)', format = 'ORC', path = '/var/lib/clickhouse/user_files/lakehouse/t1/') (c0, c1, c2) VALUES (2, 'example', 3.14);
